notes: CodificationSection, , , , which directed the Secretary of the Interior to prescribe regulations necessary to carry out the provisions of this subchapter, was omitted from the Code as being of special and not general application.Pub. L. 101–484, § 9104 Stat. 1169Oct. 31, 1990
